data.title: Digital Currency Group sues subsidiaries over $1.1B promissory note
data.description:
The latest legal battle between Digital Currency Group and Genesis centered on a promissory note issued amid the collapse of Three Arrows Capital in 2022.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/digital-currency-group-lawsuit-genesis-promissory-note?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Why Digital Currency Group Is Suing Its Own Subsidiary Over $1.1 Billion Loan
data.description:
Digital Currency Group has sued its subsidiary, crypto lender Genesis, in the latest twist of a saga that's been unfolding since 2022.
source: https://decrypt.co/335551/why-digital-currency-group-suing-subsidiary-over-1-1-billion-loan

data.title: Grayscale seeks nod from US SEC for Dogecoin ETF under the ticker ‘GDOG’
data.description:
Grayscale is forging ahead with its proposal to list and trade an ETF that trades Dogecoin, landing on the ticker symbol "GDOG. "
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/367161/grayscale-seeks-nod-from-us-sec-for-dogecoin-etf-under-the-ticker-gdog?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Plasma AI Mainnet Test Launch on Aave Exceeds $1B TVL
data.description:
Plasma's mainnet on Aave launched with over $1B TVL, marking it the second largest USDT market.
source: https://coincu.com/355169-plasma-aave-mainnet-launch

data.title: Cynthia Lummis Backs Budget-Neutral Bitcoin Reserve – Using Seized Crypto, Not Purchases
data.description:
Cynthia Lummis has supported Scott Bessent’s statement that the U. S. has said it will not buy Bitcoin for the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, favoring a budget-neutral path using forfeited assets and a possible gold revaluation, as Bitcoin has hit fresh highs.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/senator-cynthia-lummis-backs-budget-neutral-bitcoin-reserve/

data.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin seeks Asia acquisitions to boost BTC holdings: Report
data.description:
American Bitcoin is reportedly exploring acquisitions in Japan and Hong Kong to expand its Bitcoin stockpile.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-linked-american-bitcoin-asia-acquisitions-btc?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_t%3D1755293966307%26_%3D1755293966307%26t%3D1755293966307&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: DeFi Development Corp Bets $273M on 110K Solana as SOL Per Share Skyrockets 48%
data.description:
DeFi Development Corp has bought 110,000 SOL for $22M, taking holdings to 1. 42M SOL and lifting SOL per share 48% over 30 days. The company has staked all new tokens across validators, reports Q2 revenue of $1. 98M and net income of $15. 4M, and has estimated a ~10% annualized validator yield.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/defidevcorp-bets-273m-on-110k-solana-as-sol-per-share-skyrockets-48/

data.title: Deribit Introduces USDC-Settled Options for BTC and ETH
data.description:
Deribit launches USDC-settled options for Bitcoin and Ethereum, enhancing stablecoin derivatives.
source: https://coincu.com/355166-deribit-usdc-bitcoin-ethereum-options

data.title: Fed Scraps Crypto Oversight Program After Trump’s “Debanking” Outcry
data.description:
With political pressure rising, the Fed has ended SR 23-7 and returned to routine review of bank crypto, stablecoin and DLT activities. Crypto oversight has continued under risk-based rules as FDIC and OCC have clarified custody, while ‘reputational risk’ has been dropped.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/fed-scraps-crypto-oversight-program-after-trumps-debanking-outcry/

data.title: BitMine becomes the first company to surpass 1M ETH holdings worth over $5B
data.description:
BitMine has become the first corporate treasury to surpass 1 million Ethereum (ETH) in holdings after its stash climbed to 1. 17 million ETH on Aug. 15, valued at over $5 billion. The firm added 317,126 tokens worth approximately $2 billion in a single week
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitmine-becomes-the-first-company-to-surpass-1m-eth-holdings-worth-over-5-billion/

data.title: Wellgistics debuts XRP payments for independent US pharmacies
data.description:
Wellgistics is bringing Ripple’s XRP Ledger to 6,500 US pharmacies, one of the first large-scale blockchain payment systems in healthcare.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/wellgistics-enables-xrp-payments-us-pharmacies?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: US DOJ seizes $2.8M+ crypto from ransomware operation
data.description:
The United States Department of Justice (DOJ) has unsealed warrants that led to the seizure of cryptocurrency worth over $2. 8 million, $70,000 in cash, and a luxury vehicle in an operation linked to Ianis Aleksandrovich Antropenko. United States authorities indicted Antropenko on charges of conspiracy to commit computer fraud and abuse and money laundering. Antropenko […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-doj-seizes-crypto-ransomware-operation/

data.title: The Daily: Ethereum DAT SharpLink dips on $103 million Q2 loss, ETH ETFs see strong inflows, Galaxy raises $1.4 billion in debt financing and more
data.description:

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/367151/the-daily-ethereum-dat-sharplink-dips-on-103-million-q2-loss-eth-etfs-see-strong-inflows-galaxy-raises-1-4-billion-in-debt-financing-and-more?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
